properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v2 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lately, I've had a thousand closing doors That made me have to trust You even more Gotta just wait, gotta have faith He's got something good in store

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And every no means You've got a better yes Every "not now" gets me closer to its best Believe and You'll be leading me to somewhere I'll be blessed Every no means You've got a better yes

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: One thing I've learned; gotta live with open hands (live with open hands) Lifting offering of all my hopes and plans It can be hard, even break my heart But I've come to understand

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Every no means You've got a better yes Every "not now" gets me closer to its best Believe and You'll be leading me to somewhere I'll be blessed Every no means You've got a better yes

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: All I want is what You want for me You will meet my each and every need And I am sure of Your great love for me Every no means You've got a better yes

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Oh-oh-oh-oh, oh-oh-oh-oh-oh-oh (You've got a better yes) Oh-oh-oh-oh, oh-oh-oh-oh-oh-oh
